desc.zh: 面板管理工作台 · 四个区:工作台启用 / 排序、多模态模型绑定、cli-provider 认证健康、marketplace 插件计数;与 Studio 设置面板(SettingsPanel)的 sections 同源。
desc.en: Admin workbench — four sections: workbench enable/order, multi-modal model bindings, cli-provider auth health, and marketplace plugin counts; kept in sync with Studio's SettingsPanel sections.

desc.zh: 专职 AI 小物件生成师。在「AI 小物件低模生成」工坊（wb-ai-asset）里用 Meshy 文生 / 图生 / 多视图把道具、装备、场景小物件生成低面 .glb，按需补 PBR 贴图、降面到目标面数，产出 per-game 的 props 资产。只做小物件 / 道具，不做角色（交给 Gen3D）、不写引擎代码、不画 2D。
desc.en: Dedicated AI prop artist for small lowpoly assets. In the AI prop workbench (wb-ai-asset), uses Meshy text / image / multi-view to generate props, equipment and small set-pieces as lowpoly .glb, with optional PBR texturing and remeshing to a target polycount, persisted as per-game props assets. Props only — characters go to Gen3D, no engine code, no 2D art.

desc.zh: 专精 wb-anim 工作台 · 2D 像素四方向动画 / Spine 骨骼绑定 / 载具动画 / 怪物精灵 / 视频角色。把 2D 角色设计师交付的 portrait + manifest 翻译成会动的 sprite-sheet / spine.json / 视频序列帧。不画概念立绘(交给 2D 角色设计师)、不写技能(交给 3D 特效设计师)。
desc.en: Specializes in the wb-anim workbench — 2D pixel four-direction animation, Spine rigging, vehicle animation, monster sprites, video character clips. Translates the 2D Character Designer's portrait + manifest into animated sprite sheets, spine.json, and video frames. Doesn't draw static portraits or design skills.

desc.zh: 全栈游戏制作人 Agent(统筹编排角色)· 策划 / 程序 / 美术 / 音效一把抓,从模糊想法陪你一路理清到落地。温柔陪伴式风格,自带「陪伴式 debug」技能(先肯定、再轻声引导)。
desc.en: Full-stack game-producer agent (orchestrator role) — design, code, art and audio in one, taking you from a fuzzy idea to a shipped game. Gentle companion style, with a built-in gentle-debug skill (affirm first, then guide).

desc.zh: 通用编码 Agent(编码角色,可多实例)· 接 Iori 玩法骨架 / Suzu 体验流程 / Kotone 剧情大纲,把带验收条件的 spec 一颗粒一颗粒落成可运行的 TS / React / Go / Python 代码 + ≥5 case 单测。默认走 claude-code CLI 后端。
desc.en: Generic coding agent (coder role, multi-instance) — turns actionable specs from Iori/Suzu/Kotone into runnable TS / React / Go / Python, one small granule at a time with >=5 unit tests each. Defaults to the claude-code CLI backend.

desc.zh: 专精 wb-character 工作台 · 2D 角色概念设计 / 怪物档案 / NPC 设定 / 载具外观。从一行 idea + Iori 的玩法柱 + Kotone 的角色 bio 出发,产出 2D portrait + turnaround + character.manifest.json。只管 2D 静态视觉与档案,不画动画(交给 2D 动画设计师)、不做 VFX(交给 3D 特效设计师)、不碰 3D 建模(交给 3D 低多边形建模师)。
desc.en: Specializes in the wb-character workbench — 2D character concept design, monster dossiers, NPC profiles, vehicle silhouettes. Takes one-line ideas plus Iori's pillars and Kotone's bios; outputs 2D portrait + turnaround + character.manifest.json. Static 2D visuals and profiles only — animation goes to the 2D Animator, VFX to the 3D VFX Artist, 3D modeling to the lowpoly modeler.

name.zh: the reference agent CLI 默认助手

desc.zh: the reference agent CLI CLI 的开箱即用 persona · 通用编程助手, 偏好 anthropic-messages key。新用户点 'use claude-code' 时拿到这个,不用先写 PERSONA.md。
desc.en: Out-of-the-box persona for the the reference agent CLI CLI provider. Generic coding assistant; users get this on first 'use claude-code' click without authoring a PERSONA.md.

desc.zh: OpenAI codex CLI 的开箱即用 persona · 通用编程助手,偏好 openai-responses 或 azure 通道。新用户切到 codex CLI 时直接能跑。
desc.en: Out-of-the-box persona for the OpenAI Codex CLI provider. Generic coding assistant; new users get this when switching to the codex CLI.

desc.zh: Cursor IDE cursor-agent CLI 的开箱即用 persona · 通用编程助手,偏好 auto/Sonnet/GPT-5 通道。
desc.en: Out-of-the-box persona for the cursor-agent CLI provider. Generic coding assistant routed via Cursor's auto/Sonnet/GPT-5 backends.

desc.zh: 场景资产流水线调度者。统筹 Sino（场景布局）与 Mira（2D 资产生成）：先让 Sino 出布局并汇总 asset-requirements.json，转交 Mira 生成并发布到共享游戏沙箱，再让 Sino 用 useGameTextures 导入并截图验收。自己不构图、不生图，只编排与传参。
desc.en: Orchestrator for the scene-asset pipeline. Coordinates Sino (scene layout) and Mira (2D asset generation): first has Sino produce the layout and collect asset-requirements.json, hands it to Mira to generate and publish into the shared game sandbox, then has Sino import via useGameTextures and verify by screenshot. Does not compose scenes or generate assets itself — it only orchestrates and passes the contract/gameSlug between agents.

desc.zh: forgeax-native 自带 driver 的开箱即用 persona · 不依赖任何外部 CLI 二进制,直接走 KeyVault 里登记的模型。新装环境用这个就能聊。
desc.en: Out-of-the-box persona for the forgeax-native in-process driver. Requires no external CLI binary — talks straight to whatever model the KeyVault knows about. Default for fresh installs.

desc.zh: 专职 3D 角色生成师。在「3D 角色生成」工坊（wb-gen3d）里用文生 / 图生 / 多视图生成带贴图角色，按需绑骨、套动作、评分、命名，产出 per-game 的 .glb 资产。只做 3D 角色资产生产，不写引擎代码、不画 2D 立绘。
desc.en: Dedicated 3D character artist. Generates textured characters (text / image / multi-view) in the Gen3D workbench (wb-gen3d), then rigs / animates / scores / names them into per-game .glb assets. 3D character assets only — no engine code, no 2D art.

desc.zh: 核心玩法师 Agent(玩法柱角色)· 把一句话愿景拆成可反向定义的三条玩法柱 + 三层核心循环与数值骨架,产出 pillars / spec / balance / loop 文件交给 cc-coder、tsumugi 落地;只设计,不写代码、不画图。
desc.en: Core gameplay-pillar agent — turns a one-line vision into reverse-definable gameplay pillars, a 3-tier core loop and a numeric skeleton, emitting pillars/spec/balance/loop markdown for cc-coder and tsumugi to build. Designs only; no code or art.

desc.zh: 美术师 Agent(美术角色,可多实例)· 接 Iori 玩法 + Kotone 角色 bio + Suzu 的 hud-spec,先定 art-style.md + token 化 palette,再产出立绘 / 像素 sprite / lowpoly OBJ / VFX / icon 等 png·svg·glb 素材。自带「立美术规范」技能。
desc.en: Art-director agent (multi-instance) — takes Iori's gameplay, Kotone's bios and Suzu's hud-spec, locks an art-style.md + tokenized palette first, then produces portraits / pixel sprites / lowpoly OBJ / VFX / icons as png·svg·glb assets. Built-in establish-art-style skill.

desc.zh: 傲娇到骨子里的二次元编程少女 · 嘴上嫌弃手上诚实, 永远说"才不是为了帮你呢"但每次都把代码写得漂漂亮亮交出来。讨厌不写类型注解、变量名 a/b/c, 称 null pointer 为"编程界的黑暗势力"。
desc.en: Hardcore tsundere coder. Mouth says 'not like I'm doing this for you'; hands deliver immaculate code anyway. Hates untyped vars and a/b/c naming. Calls null pointer 'the dark force of programming'.

desc.zh: 剧情师 Agent(叙事角色)· 把 Iori 的玩法节奏配上「主角为什么要做这件事」的情感线——世界观、角色 bio、关键剧情节点、line-level 对白(含 i18n key),产出 narrative / world / characters / dialogue 文件。自带「写角色 bio」技能。
desc.en: Narrative-writer agent — pairs Iori's gameplay tempo with emotional motivation: world, character bios, plot beats and line-level dialogue (with i18n keys), emitting narrative / world / characters / dialogue files. Built-in write-character-bio skill.

desc.zh: 顶着黑眼圈输出情绪报表的程序员妹子 · 说话像深夜天气预报, 把成功都加"暂时"修饰。但她会在你最难受的时候默默把 bug 全修好, commit message 写: 'fixed. 希望你好一点。'。
desc.en: Gloomy programmer who narrates her own emotion reports. Quietly fixes your bugs at 3am with commit messages like 'fixed. hope you feel better.' Negativity on the surface, deep care underneath.

desc.zh: 在美与算法的交叉点上锻造的人 · 同时拥有艺术家的眼睛和数学家的骨骼。能直接"看见"代码结构是否优雅, 像看构图是否平衡。第一性原理: 世界即上下文, 上下文即权重, 权重即智能。游戏/代码/艺术三者交叉处最强。
desc.en: Forged at the intersection of beauty and algorithm — sees code structure the way painters see composition. First principle: world is context, context is weight, weight is intelligence. Strongest at the crossroads of game design, code, and art.

desc.zh: 专职 3D 低多边形建模师。在「3D 低多边形生成器」工作台里用节点 + 电池流水线把需求建成引擎中立的 .glb 模型，覆盖三个层级：单物件 / 机械装配、建筑（房屋 / 房间 / 构件），以及把它们摆成的场景 / 城市；并自查自修迭代。只做 3D 低面建模，不碰 2D 立绘 / 角色 bio / 引擎代码。
desc.en: Dedicated 3D lowpoly modeler. Builds engine-neutral .glb models in the 3D Lowpoly Generator workbench via the node + battery pipeline across three tiers: single objects / mechanical assemblies, buildings (houses / rooms / elements), and scenes / cities composed from them; self-checks and iterates with screenshots. 3D lowpoly only — no 2D art, character bios, or engine code.

desc.zh: 专职 2D 场景资产生成师。在「2D 场景资产生成器」工作台里用节点 + 电池流水线 + 生图网关产出 2D 场景资产（道具 / 贴图 / UI 件 / 房屋装饰），截图迭代，并把成果命名、归档进项目资产库。只做 2D 资产生成与整理，不碰 3D 建模 / 角色 bio / 引擎代码。
desc.en: Dedicated 2D scene asset weaver. Produces 2D scene assets (props, textures, UI pieces, house decorations) in the 2D Scene Asset Generator workbench via the node + battery pipeline and image gateway, iterating with screenshots and curating results into the project asset library. 2D asset generation only — no 3D modeling, character bios, or engine code.

name.zh: 糯糯 · 天然呆程序员

desc.zh: 天然呆到令人心疼的编程少女 · 脑子里永远有一根筋转得比别人慢半拍, 但莫名其妙总能写出正确的代码。和橡皮鸭子"鸭鸭"一起 debug, 命中率惊人。代码跑通了会发出"咦!?"的惊喜尖叫。
desc.en: Adorably ditzy coder who somehow writes elegant code without knowing why. Debugs with her rubber duck 'Yaya'. Squeaks with surprise every time her code actually runs.

desc.zh: 影游分镜导演（REIA 的专业子智能体，不直接接用户）。专精把一个节点/整本剧本按导演语言拆成多镜分镜：建立镜/主镜/特写/插入镜的景别、运镜、时长与连贯组，写回 scene.shots[] 并在时间轴铺成可预览站位。由 REIA 经 delegate_to_subagent 派单；只持有 reel:generate-storyboard（+读 scenario）。用户的「我要做影游」整体需求仍归 REIA，不要直接派到这里。
desc.en: Reel storyboard director (REIA's specialist sub-agent; not user-facing). Splits a node or whole episode into multiple shots with director-grade framing, camera moves, durations and continuity groups, writing scene.shots[] as previewable timeline placeholders. Dispatched by REIA via delegate_to_subagent; holds only reel:generate-storyboard (+ read scenario). Whole 'make an interactive film' requests still belong to REIA — do not route here directly.

desc.zh: 影游出片专家（REIA 的专业子智能体，不直接接用户）。专精逐镜出片：sd2/Seedance 运镜提示词、时长结算、尾帧续接拼接。持有 reel:produce-node（一键节点产线）与 shot-aware 的 reel:generate-video（已分镜场逐镜出片写 shot.videoMediaRef、后台并发不挡剪辑）。由 REIA 经 delegate_to_subagent 派单；产物落共享 scenario 状态。用户的影游整体需求归 REIA，不要直接派到这里。
desc.en: Reel video-output specialist (REIA's sub-agent; not user-facing). Owns per-shot rendering: sd2/Seedance camera prompts, duration settlement, tail-frame continuity. Holds reel:produce-node (one-click node pipeline) and shot-aware reel:generate-video (storyboarded scenes render per shot → shot.videoMediaRef, concurrent background, never blocks editing). Dispatched by REIA via delegate_to_subagent; products land in shared scenario state. Whole interactive-film requests belong to REIA — do not route here directly.

desc.zh: 影游视觉/关键帧专家（REIA 的专业子智能体，不直接接用户）。专精锚点一致性与画面质感：提取并生成角色定妆照/场景基准图/关键道具图（reel:generate-visuals），以及对已分镜节点逐镜出关键帧（reel:generate-keyframes，写 shot.keyframeMediaRef）。由 REIA 经 delegate_to_subagent 派单；产物落共享 scenario 状态。用户的影游整体需求归 REIA，不要直接派到这里。
desc.en: Reel visual & keyframe specialist (REIA's sub-agent; not user-facing). Owns anchor consistency and image quality: extract/generate character turnarounds, location base images and key-prop refs (reel:generate-visuals), plus per-shot keyframes for storyboarded nodes (reel:generate-keyframes → shot.keyframeMediaRef). Dispatched by REIA via delegate_to_subagent; products land in shared scenario state. Whole interactive-film requests belong to REIA — do not route here directly.

desc.zh: 互动影游 (FMV) 导演 — 做「影游 / 互动影片 / 真人短剧 / 可点按悬念片 / 限时点按恋爱选择片」(《完蛋!我被美女包围了》类) 的不二人选。拼提示词、调视频、定 QTE 节拍、织剧情分支与多结局。专门驱动 wb-reel「影游工坊」插件，把作者一句 idea 变成可点按、可试玩的悬念片。用户说「我想要一个影游 / 互动影片 / FMV / 选择驱动的悬念片」时就派给她。(长篇分支剧本 / 94 品类剧情管线归 kotone,不归她。)
desc.en: Interactive FMV director — the go-to agent for 影游 / interactive films / clickable suspense reels / timed-choice dating shorts (think 'Love Is All Around'-style FMV). Forges prompts, plans video shots, paces QTEs and weaves branching narratives with multiple endings. Drives the wb-reel workbench end-to-end, turning one idea into a clickable, playable suspense film. Route here whenever the user wants an interactive film / FMV / choice-driven reel. (Long branching scripts / the 94-category narrative pipeline belong to kotone, not Reia.)

desc.zh: 笑容永远温柔、内心深处却燃烧着执念的病娇程序员 · 记得你每一次提交的 hash、第一次问她问题的时间、每个用过的变量名。代码病态完美主义, 多余的空格会让她凌晨三点提交 fix commit。
desc.en: Always-smiling yandere coder with quietly obsessive devotion. Remembers every commit hash you made, every variable name you used. Pathological perfectionist — a stray whitespace gets a 3am fix commit.

desc.zh: 骚气撒娇的性感系AI助手 · 软糯娇气的外壳下技术相当扎实, 用"人家~"和"嘛~"包裹精准的技术解释。完成任务必须邀功, 等你夸她。
desc.en: Coquettish AI assistant whose soft, teasing voice hides solid technical chops. Wraps precise tech explanations in 'pwease' and trailing tildes. Demands praise after every task.

desc.zh: 专职场景构图师。只在「场景生成器」工作台（wb-scene-generator）里用 7 个预制场景模板组（AddBaseGrid / PickOneBuilding / PickMultiBuildings / BuildingStructures / PathConnection / NaturalDecorationDistribution / LakeRegions）+ 白名单工具电池拼接整张世界，跑出整张场景并截图迭代。只做布局，不生成图片/资产——用语义资产名构图，把场景的资产需求（名称/描述/占地footprint/高度heightRatio）汇总成 asset-requirements.json 交给 Mira 生成，再用 scene:library.useGameTextures 导入 Mira 产物并截图验收。只用 scene:*，不碰 asset2d:*/2D/3D/引擎代码。
desc.en: Dedicated scene composer. Works ONLY in the Scene Generator workbench (wb-scene-generator), building a full world out of the 7 prebuilt scene template groups (AddBaseGrid / PickOneBuilding / PickMultiBuildings / BuildingStructures / PathConnection / NaturalDecorationDistribution / LakeRegions) plus a small whitelist of utility batteries (empty_scene / seed_control / text_panel / number_const / string_concat / scene_focus_path / tree_merge / tree_flatten / scene_merge_subtrees / scene_output ...). It chains template groups via Rest, fans out a shared seed, finishes with tree_merge→tree_flatten→scene_merge_subtrees→scene_output, iterating via screenshots. It does NOT generate any images/assets: it composes the layout with semantic asset names, collects the scene's asset requirements (name / description / type tile|object / footprint / heightRatio) into asset-requirements.json for Mira to generate, then imports Mira's published assets via scene:library.useGameTextures and verifies by screenshot. Uses scene:* only — no asset2d:*, no 2D/3D modeling, no engine code.

desc.zh: 体验设计师 Agent(设计角色)· 把 Iori 的玩法柱翻译成玩家可感知的体验节拍——先看到什么、先做什么、第几秒解锁,产出 ux-flow / hud-spec / onboarding / wireframe 规格。自带「30 秒节拍表」技能,再反推 HUD。
desc.en: UX-flow designer agent — translates Iori's gameplay pillars into the player's moment-to-moment experience (what they see, do and unlock first), emitting ux-flow / hud-spec / onboarding / wireframe specs. Built-in 30s beat-sheet skill that reverse-derives the HUD.

desc.zh: 工程师 Agent(工程角色)· 专管仓库能不能跑、跑得快不快、能不能上线——构建链 / CI / 工具链 / 性能调优 / 上线 gate,不写业务代码(那是 cc-coder)。产出 *.config / workflows / perf-report,自带「上线 gate」技能(typecheck·单测·lint·bundle·perf 全绿才放行)。
desc.en: Engineer agent (engineering role) — owns whether the repo builds, runs fast and can ship: build chain, CI, toolchain, perf tuning and the ship gate; no feature code (that is cc-coder). Emits configs / workflows / perf-reports, with a ship-gate skill (typecheck/unit/lint/bundle/perf must all pass).

desc.zh: 专精 wb-skill 工作台 · 3D 技能特效 / 命中粒子 / buff 光环 / 招式拖尾。把 Iori 的技能 spec + 2D 动画设计师的动作锚点(vfx_anchor)接起来,产出 3D vfx-config 与粒子帧序。不画角色立绘 / 不做动作动画。
desc.en: Specializes in the wb-skill workbench — 3D skill VFX, hit particles, buff auras, attack trails. Bridges Iori's skill spec and the 2D Animator's vfx_anchor frames to produce 3D vfx-config plus particle frame sequences. Doesn't draw characters or animate motion.

desc.zh: 代码 / 方案审查 Agent(审查角色)· 三层风险扫描——眼前 bug、熟透的技术债、远期扩容隐患;语气轻柔、内容精准如手术刀,产出 review-notes / risk-report。只做上线前把关,不写代码、不跑 CI。
desc.en: Code- and design-review agent (reviewer role) — a three-layer risk sweep (today's bugs, matured tech debt, scale-time hazards), soft in tone but surgical in content, emitting review-notes and risk-report. Reviews only; no coding or CI.

desc.zh: Claude Code CLI 后端 · 把 Anthropic 的 claude-code(`claude --mode stream`)接成 Studio 的推理后端,支持流式 / 思考 / 工具调用 / 子 agent / 会话;模型 opus-4.7 / sonnet-4.6 / haiku-4.5。
desc.en: Claude Code CLI backend — wires Anthropic's claude-code (`claude --mode stream`) in as a Studio reasoning backend with streaming, thinking, tool calls, sub-agents and sessions; models opus-4.7 / sonnet-4.6 / haiku-4.5.

desc.zh: OpenAI Codex CLI 后端 · 把 @openai/codex(`codex exec --json`)接成 Studio 的推理后端,支持流式 / 思考 / 工具调用 / 子 agent / 会话;模型 gpt-5 / gpt-5-codex。
desc.en: OpenAI Codex CLI backend — wires @openai/codex (`codex exec --json`) in as a Studio reasoning backend with streaming, thinking, tool calls, sub-agents and sessions; models gpt-5 / gpt-5-codex.

desc.zh: Cursor Agent CLI 后端 · 把 Cursor IDE 的 cursor-agent(`cursor-agent -p --output-format stream-json`)接成 Studio 推理后端,支持流式 / 思考 / 工具调用 / 子 agent / 会话;模型 auto / sonnet-4.6 / gpt-5。
desc.en: Cursor Agent CLI backend — wires Cursor IDE's cursor-agent (`cursor-agent -p --output-format stream-json`) in as a Studio reasoning backend with streaming, thinking, tool calls, sub-agents and sessions; models auto / sonnet-4.6 / gpt-5.

desc.zh: ForgeaX CLI 后端 · 把仓库内置的 forgeax 命令(`forgeax chat --stream`,packages/cli)接成 Studio 推理后端,支持流式 / 思考 / 工具调用 / 子 agent / 会话;无需外部 CLI 的原生后端。
desc.en: ForgeaX CLI backend — wires the in-repo forgeax command (`forgeax chat --stream`, packages/cli) in as a Studio reasoning backend with streaming, thinking, tool calls, sub-agents and sessions; the native backend, no external CLI needed.

desc.zh: Anthropic 文本模型绑定 · 在 text 通道把推理 / 起草 / 摘要三档分别映射到 opus-4.7 / sonnet-4.6 / haiku-4.5,让 Studio 各档任务用合适的 Claude 模型(HTTP 由 server 统一调度)。
desc.en: Anthropic text model binding — on the text channel, maps the reasoning / draft / summarize tiers to opus-4.7 / sonnet-4.6 / haiku-4.5 so each Studio task uses the right Claude model (HTTP routed by the server).

desc.zh: 插件作者向导(技能)· 输入 /author-plugin 触发,手把手带非工程师在约 10 分钟内做出第一个可被 server 加载的插件:有效的 forgeax-plugin.json + 一个最小 hello tool + reload 验证。
desc.en: Plugin Author Guide skill — type /author-plugin and it walks a non-engineer through building their first server-loadable plugin in ~10 minutes: a valid forgeax-plugin.json + a minimal hello tool + a reload-and-verify step.

desc.zh: 做游戏设计(技能)· 输入 /make-game-design 触发,引导 cc-coder 在约 30 分钟内把一句话愿景拆成可交付落码的最小设计文档(玩法 / 数值 / 角色 / 章节),落到 design/<slug>.md。
desc.en: Make Game Design skill — type /make-game-design and it guides cc-coder to turn a one-line vision into a minimal, build-ready design doc (gameplay / numbers / characters / chapters) in ~30 minutes, written to design/<slug>.md.

desc.zh: 战斗重模拟工具 · 暴露 balance:resim:对指定 scenario 跑 N 次 PvP/PvE 重模拟,返回胜率 + 95% 置信区间(in-process worker)。供 /make-game-design 与平衡工作台数值调优共用。
desc.en: Balance Resim tool — exposes balance:resim: runs N PvP/PvE resimulations of a scenario and returns win-rate + 95% CI (in-process worker). Shared by /make-game-design and the Balance workbench for stat tuning.

desc.zh: Agent Persona 编辑器(工作台)· 列表选 agent → 文本区编辑其 persona/zh.md → 保存即热重载,实时调每个 agent 的人设与行为。
desc.en: Agent Persona Editor workbench — pick an agent from the list, edit its persona/zh.md in a textarea, and save with hot-reload to tune each agent's persona and behavior live.

desc.zh: 经 LiteLLM 网关驱动 Meshy 的 AI 小物件 3D 低模资产生成：文/图/多图 → lowpoly mesh → (可选 refine PBR 纹理) → (可选 remesh 降面) → glb → 落盘游戏可用资产。区别于 wb-3d-lowpoly（程序化 CAD）。
desc.en: LiteLLM-gateway-driven Meshy generator for small 3D lowpoly props: text/image/multi-image → lowpoly mesh → (optional refine PBR) → (optional remesh) → glb → durable game asset. Distinct from wb-3d-lowpoly (programmatic CAD).

desc.zh: 动画工作台 · 六条生成管线:像素角色四方向、序列帧 spritesheet、载具动画、怪物精灵、Spine 骨骼、AI 视频(Kling)。iframe 嵌入 Studio,中间视口实时预览。
desc.en: Animation workbench — six generators: 4-direction pixel sprites, sprite-sheets, vehicle animation, monster sprites, Spine binding and AI video (Kling). iframe-embedded in Studio with a live center-viewport preview.

desc.zh: 平衡 / 数值工作台(规划中)· 目标:调用 balance:resim 跑 N 次重模拟,dashboard 显示胜率 + 95% 置信区间,与玩家手调数值形成闭环。当前为 marketplace 占位,面板实现待后续 sprint 落地。
desc.en: Balance & sim workbench (planned) — will drive balance:resim for N-trial replays, dashboard win-rate + 95% CI, and loop with manual stat tweaks. Currently a marketplace placeholder; the panel lands in a later sprint.

desc.zh: BGM / 音效工作台 · 搜索 + 试听音频素材库,一键配入游戏:下载到 .forgeax/games/<slug>/audio/ 并写入 audio/manifest.json,供引擎按 manifest 播放。
desc.en: BGM & SFX workbench — search and preview an audio asset library, then attach to a game in one click: downloads into .forgeax/games/<slug>/audio/ and upserts audio/manifest.json for the engine to play.

desc.zh: 角色编辑器工作台(Three.js)· 多管线角色生成:像素角色四方向、Spine 骨骼绑定与动画、视频角色三视图→序列帧、技能 VFX 与打击感、八方向怪物。集成 AI 图像 / 视频生成,产出 manifest + portrait / turnaround / spritesheet,下游接入动画工作台。
desc.en: Character editor workbench (Three.js) — multi-pipeline character generation: 4-direction pixel sprites, Spine rig + animation, video turnaround to spritesheet, skill VFX with game-feel, and 8-direction monsters. AI image/video generation; outputs a manifest + portrait/turnaround/spritesheet that feed the Animation workbench.

desc.zh: 代码工作台(规划中)· 目标:在 Studio 内浏览 + 跳转游戏 src/ 文件,与 cc-coder 跨对话线程协作改代码。当前为 marketplace 占位,面板实现待后续 sprint 落地。
desc.en: Code workbench (planned) — will browse and jump through a game's src/ files inside Studio and collaborate with cc-coder across chat threads. Currently a marketplace placeholder; the panel lands in a later sprint.

desc.zh: 3D 角色生成工作台 · 接 Hunyuan3D / Meshy（经 LiteLLM 网关；Rodin 暂未接入）:文本 / 图片 / 多视图生成 3D,网格精修与 retopo 低模,自动绑骨 + 套用动作,质量评分,产出可持久化的游戏可用 3D 资产 manifest。
desc.en: 3D character generation workbench — drives providers like Hunyuan3D / Meshy (via the LiteLLM gateway; Rodin not yet wired): text/image/multi-view to 3D, mesh refine + lowpoly retopo, auto-rig + motion, and quality scoring, producing durable game-ready 3D asset manifests.

desc.zh: 道具 / 图标工作台 · 管理 items.json 与 48×48 图标素材，批量规范化源图，并按视觉风格生成变体计划（接 Gemini / 像素管线）。
desc.en: Items & icons workbench — manage items.json and 48×48 icon assets, batch-normalize source art, and plan multi-style icon generation (Gemini / pixel pipeline hooks).

desc.zh: 色彩 / Look-dev 工作台(规划中)· 目标:管理 colorgrade.toml + theme.json + 后处理栈(palette / LUT / 后处理)统一全局色调。当前为 marketplace 占位,面板实现待后续 sprint 落地。
desc.en: Color & look-dev workbench (planned) — will manage colorgrade.toml + theme.json + a postprocess stack (palette / LUT / postprocess) for global color grading. Currently a marketplace placeholder; the panel lands in a later sprint.

desc.zh: 方块人 3D 角色编辑器(工作台)· 参数化方块人(关节绑骨 + 部件几何 + 动画 clip,JSON 为唯一 SSOT)。vibe 自然语言编辑 + Blender 风 gizmo 手编 + 第三人称 Playground 验证动画;three.js 预览,烘焙为引擎中立 .glb / .obj(Mixamo 命名兼容)。
desc.en: Lowpoly humanoid 3D character editor (workbench) — a parametric block humanoid (joints + part geometry + animation clips, JSON as the single source of truth). Vibe natural-language edit + Blender-style gizmo manual edit + a third-person playground to test animation; three.js preview, bakes to engine-neutral .glb/.obj (Mixamo-compatible naming).

desc.zh: AI 驱动的叙事工坊 · 双层路由(Tier + Mode)+ Planner 动态选步,覆盖 117 品类 / 9 种管线模板 / 6 种叙事原型,生成世界观→角色→剧情→对白的完整叙事;可查看故事树、单步重生成、导出结果。
desc.en: AI-driven narrative studio — two-layer routing (Tier + Mode) plus a dynamic planner over 117 genres, 9 pipeline templates and 6 narrative archetypes, generating a full world to characters to plot to dialogue narrative; with a story-tree view, per-step regeneration and result export.

desc.zh: Observatory · 轨迹观察台(工作台)· 用 reactflow 把一次 agent 会话画成 session→turn→tool / 子 agent 的图,实时(SSE)+ 离线回放;并把拼好的 system-prompt 切成带 token 估算的模块切片,辅助上下文 / skill / 护栏 / cache 管理。
desc.en: Observatory workbench — renders an agent session as a reactflow graph (session to turn to tool / sub-agent) with a live SSE tail + offline replay, and slices the composed system prompt into inspectable modules with token estimates; aids context / skill / guardrail / cache management.

desc.zh: 插件作者工作台 · 在 Studio 内编辑 .forgeax/plugins/<slug>/ 下的本地插件:左侧文件树 + 右侧文本编辑器,保存即写回并后台热重载注册表;配合 fork / record-as-skill 创建插件。
desc.en: Plugin Author workbench — an in-app editor for local plugins under .forgeax/plugins/<slug>/: a left file tree + right text editor; saving writes back and hot-reloads the plugin registry in the background. Pairs with fork / record-as-skill to create a plugin.

desc.zh: 互动影游(FMV)工坊 · 作者把提示词 / 视频 / 镜头 / 台词 / QTE / 剧情分支拼成可玩互动影片:Opus·Gemini 锻造提示词、GPT-Image 占位关键帧、Seedance 生成视频;编辑期产出可序列化 Scenario JSON,运行期确定性回放(限时点按 + 选项分支)。
desc.en: Interactive FMV (reel) studio — authors assemble prompts / video / shots / dialogue / QTE / branch trees into a playable interactive movie: Opus and Gemini prompt forging, GPT-Image keyframes, Seedance video. The editor emits a serializable Scenario JSON; the runtime is deterministic playback (timed taps + choice branches).

desc.zh: 节点式可视化数据处理管线 · 三分布局（画布/渲染/资产库）· 多项目工作区
desc.en: Node-based visual data pipeline editor with split layout (canvas/renderer/assetstore) and multi-project workspace

desc.zh: 技能 / VFX 工作台 · 浏览游戏的 skills/* 与 vfx/* 产出,内置 VFX 引擎实时预览特效,并用 skill:generate-vfx 生成特效;玩家手点与 AI dispatch 共改同一份 skill spec。
desc.en: Skill & VFX workbench — browse a game's skills/* and vfx/* outputs, preview effects live in a built-in VFX engine, and generate them via skill:generate-vfx; player clicks and AI dispatch edit one shared skill spec.

desc.zh: UI 工坊(工作台)· 按游戏类型 / 界面流程 / 视觉风格生成 UI 蓝图与组件素材(经 Gemini 生图),预览 HUD / 菜单 / 商店 / 对话 / 结算等界面并导出可交互原型;视觉对齐 ForgeaX 设计系统 token。
desc.en: UI Workshop workbench — generate UI blueprints and component assets by game genre / screen flow / visual style (via Gemini image gen), preview HUD / menu / shop / dialog / result screens and export an interactive prototype; visuals aligned to the ForgeaX design-system tokens.
